posts.text: Automating your podcast pipeline is smart. Automating your approvals is how mistakes go live. Use the machine to produce options. Keep a human in the seat for what actually gets published. New episode on building production systems that hold up.

At what point in your podcast workflow does quality most often slip — recording, editing, writing, or the final publish checklist? New episode digs into exactly where small teams break down and how to fix it.
